Hey everyone, just going to give you a quick rundown of how to set up hotjar to monitor your funnel and optimize your funnel. First things first, if you don't already have all of the steps of your funnel written down somewhere so you have them all handy, I'd go ahead and pause this video and get a sheet with all of the steps in your funnel that you're going to be working with. Today I'm going to be working with my book funnel and so I have my book funnel steps laid out here. I am currently signed into my hotjar account. A couple of the big things here is setting up hotjar. I'll just kind of a quick crash course. You click settings and then you're going to go to sites and organizations. And then if you've already set up your site, you should see your site below and you simply click on tracking code. From here, here's where you get your tracking code. You just click here and it copies it to the clipboard. And so you can then insert this into your click funnels header underneath your Facebook pixel code. So as long as it's there, you'll be able to run hotjar. You can verify the installation of hotjar by clicking on the verify installation tab and then type in the URL in which you know you have hotjar installed. And I have hotjar currently installed on book one so I can verify the installation. And we should get a little pop up saying hotjar and installation is verified. So that is perfect. We know hotjar is actually set up and running on this book funnel. Perfect. So we can go ahead and close that window out. We can go ahead and close it out. We are good to go. We can click back to Jim on secrets. And hotjar does a number of things. It allows you to record your funnel and it also allows you to monitor your funnel. So there's a couple of things. If you didn't already have your funnel set up, which you probably don't, you're going to press new funnel and you're going to name the steps of your funnel. So you can see how I have step one and then I have the actual funnel path and what I'm going to call it book one landing. So I can take this and say book one landing. I'm just going to put test on the end since I've already done this. And then I'm going to need the URL for that landing page. And so I'm going to do a simple match of that URL. And then I'm going to go to step two and I'm going to click my here or here, my name, because I've already named it. So I can paste the name in here. And again, I'm just going to put test on the end because I've already built this funnel out. We're going to copy this URL that should be step two in my funnel. And this is important that you get this correct. You can go back and dynamically update these and HotJard does try its best to do good math for you, but it's just best to have it right the first time. You can see we only have two steps, so we need to click add another step. And we're going to get our name for step three. And we're going to paste that in there. And again, I'm just going to write test at the end. And I'm going to grab my URL for step three. So this funnel is short. It has three steps. It's a book landing where they can then check out for the book. And we get an application filled out as they order the book. And then it redirects them over to schedule their call, right? On this page, it has the schedule call page. And once they schedule their call, they're redirected over to the thank you page. And so that's how we know somebody has not only completed the initial application, but also set a schedule to call with our team. So once we have those three steps built in there, it's just as simple as pressing create funnel. Oh, you have to name it. I'm sorry. So we'll just say book funnel test. We're going to press create funnel. And now you can see it's generating the funnel. So while that's generating here, we'll go ahead and hop into how you set up recordings. So when I click into recordings, I think it's going to show me that I already have a bunch of recordings running. And so I can't actually set up new recordings until I stop my old recording. So I'm just going to go ahead and stop my old recording that I've set up. And now I have a record visitors button. So this should be something very much like you see. So we're going to hit record visitors. By default, it says quantity 2000 recordings. This is how many recordings you want. I believe Hotjar has different tiers of service. The free trial certainly take advantage of it. 2000 recordings is something easily done. So by default, I do 2000. I don't need to look at more than 2000 recordings to understand where I need to optimize my funnel. Page targeting becomes a very simple thing. And you can see that it still has my start recording when users visit this or this. Probably can get rid of this. It should be the same. So anytime somebody hits jimlaunchsecrets.com, we want to start recording of the page. And so, again, you can also record when they visit any page of your funnel. But this just makes me get target recordings for what I'm looking to optimize. Going down into recording options, I can choose only click and scroll sessions. So what this allows is basically that somebody's actually interacted. If somebody just loads your page and then closes out, it's not going to record it. You can do only 30 seconds plus sessions. And then you can record some keystroke data. That said, I just do only click and scroll sessions. This seems to be the most effective for me. Hopping down into start recording from there, it's pretty simple. You just press start recording. And hotjar is now recording visitors on your website. And so you can see I have a bunch of recordings already inside of here that hotjar has done for me. A couple of quick crash courses on how to use this recordings. This ad filter is really great. So you can say landing URL contains book one, apply. So this is going to give me everything where they started on book one. And then if I want to look at people that are dropping off on the first page, I could limit to one page. Or if I want to look at people that are making it to further in the funnel, I can look at those pages. So I can press add filter and I can say page count. I know it says greater than here. This really means greater than or equal to. So if we want to see everybody that has two or more, we're going to put two in greater than. And so once we press apply, you can see it adjusts the page count to two or more. And so now I have all of the videos that I'm recording or that have that have been recorded that have two or more pages. So these are going to be people that have actually opted into something and, you know, either just purchased a book or they maybe went all the way to the to the final route and schedule the call.
